items.title: The Washington Wizards decline their team option for Jamir Watkins, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Washington Wizards decline their team option for Jamir Watkins, a league source told @spotrac.com.

The Wizards did tender a qualifying offer to Watkins. He'll now be a restricted free agent this offseason.
